finalized_plan.description: Perform a web search with a simplified query to locate any potential replit.com blog post from 2018 related to VSCode and a demonstration video about removing extra lines
Review the search results to identify a candidate blog post that matches the criteria (i.e., hosted on replit.com, dated to 2018, focusing on VSCode with an embedded demonstration video)
Visit the candidate blog post URL using the visit_page tool to retrieve the complete content
Scan the blog post for the demonstration video and any accompanying transcript or textual description that indicates the command to remove extra lines
Locate the exact portion in the text (or transcript) where the command is mentioned or confirmed, verifying that it is the one clicked in the video
Extract the URL of the blog post and the excerpt (transcript/description) that confirms the command

Compile a detailed final answer including:
  • A short summary (task outcome short version) with the command and blog post URL.
  • A step-by-step detailed explanation (task outcome extremely detailed version) that describes how the command was derived from the blog post content.
  • Any additional context or observations relevant to the solution

root_cause_reasoning: The agent used incorrect search queries, attempting to directly find the command lind but ended up not even knowing what the webpage of the VSCode blog.
